nasb.text: They will mock Him and spit on Him, and scourge Him and kill Him, and three days later He will rise again.”

esv.text: And they will mock him and spit on him, and flog him and kill him. And after three days he will rise.”

cnv.text: 他們要凌辱他，向他吐唾沫，鞭打他，殺害他，三天以後，他要復活。”

ccb.text: 他们会嘲弄祂，向祂吐唾沫，鞭打祂，杀害祂。但是，三天之后祂必复活！”

csbs.text: 他们要戏弄他、向他吐唾沫、鞭打他，并杀害他；然后在第三天，他要复活。”
